title: Surgeon Vacancy at Abbott India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Abbott India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Abbott India has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Chennai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Abbott India:
Abbott India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Abbott India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
